---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

How you envision the feature working (optional).

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered (optional).

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references that help illustrate the request (optional).

---

> **Note:** Issues are triaged by maintainers and may be promoted to Jira for planning.
